title: Kĩsese kya IATF
summary: Kĩsese kya andũ onthe kya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yaĩ na vata wa kwĩthĩwa na mũvĩa ũtonya kũtetheesya andũ maelewe nĩ kĩla kĩendeee, wĩ na ũvoo ũtonya kũmatetheesya mamanye matambya ala maĩle kwosa, na wĩ na mĩvango mĩseo ya kũtethya wĩa ũsu.
why: Kĩsese kĩu kĩthĩawa na syĩndũ mbingĩ itonya kũtũmĩwa nĩ mũndũ maũndũnĩ ta kũsoma, kũalyũla, na kũsũvĩa.
scopeIn: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova kĩ na Mwanya wa Kũseũvya Mbulosua Kĩsesenĩ kya www.jw.org
Kĩeleelo kya kũandĩka ũvoo ũsu nĩ kwony'a andũ ala mekwenda kũtetheew'a maume ndĩninĩ sya ũvũngũ kana nĩ aseo.
Tulakiti ĩla yĩthĩawa yĩandĩkĩtwe maũndũ ala makonanĩtye na ũmbano na vala ũmbano ũsu ũkekĩwa
Kĩthyomo kya Andũ ala Matew'aa kya Ireland
Static deployment on Cloudflare Workers Static Assets Ũkũnĩa ũmbano ũtakathela
scopeOut: Private member areas, accounts, or login flows Ũtumbĩthyo wa ilungu na mĩvĩa ya kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ
Kĩsio kĩla kĩthĩawa na vulongulamu sya kũtumbĩthya mavuku kwa ithyomo syĩ kĩvathũkany'o

title: IATF selfie
summary: Kĩndũ kĩu kĩseũvĩtw'e kĩthĩwe nĩ kyũma kya masinĩ sya sitima ila itũmĩawa wĩanĩ wa kũseũvya ngalĩ (IATF).
problem: Mĩvango ya tene ya kũseũvya syĩndũ sya masinĩ sya kw'oko na syĩndũ ingĩ ta simũ, kombiũta, na syĩndũ sya kũtũmĩa kombiũtanĩ
why: Kĩndũ kĩu kĩseũvĩtw'e kĩtetheesye andũ aingĩ makamanya ũvoo ũla wĩ Mbivilianĩ o na ethĩwa mũsomi emanyĩsye ata.
scopeIn: Kĩndũ kĩseũvĩtw'e tene mũno kĩtonya kũtũmĩwa kũtetheesya andũ makwate ũvoo ũla mekwenda
scopeOut: Kũseũvya nesa syĩndũ kana kwĩseũvĩsya syĩndũ sya matukũ aa

title: IATF yĩkaa ũu kwa nzĩa syĩ kĩvathũkany'o.
summary: IATF community bot, archived after reaching a natural stopping point. Kĩndũ kĩseũvĩtw'e na masinĩ sya kw'oko kwa mũndũ.
problem: Kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ kwĩsĩla simũ kwĩthĩĩtwe kwĩ kwa vata mũno ũseũvyonĩ wa IATF
why: Kĩndũ kĩu kĩseũvĩtw'e kĩtetheesye andũ aingĩ makamanya ũvoo ũla wĩ Mbivilianĩ o na ethĩwa mũsomi emanyĩsye ata.
scopeIn: Kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ kwĩsĩla simũ kwĩthĩĩtwe kwĩ kwa vata mũno ũseũvyonĩ wa IATF
scopeOut: Kũseũvya nesa syĩndũ kana kwĩseũvĩsya syĩndũ sya matukũ aa
